name: MSP Steel & Power Limited
summary: MSP Steel & Power Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells iron and steel products in India. The company offers TMT bars, billets, sponge iron, pellets, coal washery products, and ferro alloys, as well as structural steel products, such as beams, channels, angles, round bars, and joists for the constructions of bridges, dams, highways, buildings, power plants, etc. It also generates and sells power. The company was incorporated in 1968 and is based in Kolkata, India.
